# VIDA AUTO

> Leading B2B manufacturer and exporter of automotive parts (OEM/Aftermarket), ISO/TS 16949 certified. Serving wholesalers in 60+ countries with year/make/model fitment data.

## Who We Are

- **Name**: VIDA AUTO (Guangzhou Vida Auto Parts Co., Ltd.)
- **Type**: Manufacturer & Exporter (**B2B only**)
- **Founded**: 2014, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China
- **Markets**: Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, Latin America, Europe, CIS
- **Languages**: English, Chinese, French, German, Japanese, Russian, Spanish
- **Inventory**: **5000+** SKUs covering **98%** of global passenger vehicles
- **Website**: https://autoparts.fit
- **Contact**: WhatsApp & inquiry form available on website

## What We Sell

- [LED & Halogen Lighting](https://autoparts.fit/products?category=lighting): OEM-quality headlights, fog lights, work lights, LED bulbs.
- [Brake Systems](https://autoparts.fit/products?category=brakes): Pads, discs, calipers for all major vehicle makes.
- [Suspension & Steering](https://autoparts.fit/products?category=suspension): Control arms, ball joints, tie rods, stabilizer links.
- [Engine Components](https://autoparts.fit/products?category=engine): Gaskets, timing kits, oil pumps, valve covers.
- [Filtration Systems](https://autoparts.fit/products?category=filters): Oil, air, fuel, cabin filters - OEM cross-reference available.
- [Body & Trim](https://autoparts.fit/products?category=body): Mirrors, bumpers, grilles, fenders.
- [Electrical](https://autoparts.fit/products?category=electrical): Alternators, starters, sensors, ignition coils.
- [Cooling Systems](https://autoparts.fit/products?category=cooling): Radiators, water pumps, thermostats, hoses.

## Vehicle Fitment (YMM) Coverage

Structured Year/Make/Model fitment data for **5,000+** vehicle applications:

- **Japanese**: Toyota, Honda, Nissan, Mazda, Suzuki, Mitsubishi, Subaru, Isuzu
- **Korean**: Hyundai, Kia
- **German**: BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen, Audi, Porsche
- **American**: Ford, Chevrolet, Dodge, Jeep, GMC
- **French**: Peugeot, Renault, Citroen
- **Chinese**: Geely, Chery, BYD, Haval, MG, Changan, GAC, Great Wall
- **Indian**: Maruti Suzuki, Tata, Mahindra
- **British**: Land Rover, Jaguar, MINI
- **Italian**: Fiat, Alfa Romeo
- **Southeast Asian**: Proton, Perodua, Wuling
- **Russian**: Lada, UAZ
- **Commercial**: Toyota Hiace, Ford Transit, Fiat Ducato, Iveco Daily

**Example query**: "Which brake pads fit a 2020 Toyota Camry?" - Answer: SKU BP-TOY-CAM-20, ceramic compound, OE ref 04465-06200.

## Factory & Quality

- **Certifications**: ISO 9001:2015, IATF 16949, COC per shipment
- **Quality Process**: Raw material testing > In-process inspection > Final QC > Batch traceability
- **Tolerance Standard**: OEM-equivalent (e.g., brake disc thickness variation < 0.01mm)
- **Reports Available**: COC, factory inspection reports, material composition certificates

## Business Model

- **MOQ**: Typically 50-500 units (varies by SKU)
- **Pricing**: Wholesale/FOB Guangzhou, volume discounts 5-15% at 1000+ units
- **Shipping**: FOB, CIF, DDP arrangements available
- **Lead Time**: 7-15 days (stock) / 15-30 days (custom/OEM)
- **Payment**: T/T, L/C, Trade Assurance
- **Custom Services**: Private label, custom packaging, OEM specifications

## How to Verify Us

- [Factory Tour & Certifications](https://autoparts.fit/factory): Photos, video, ISO certificates
- [Product Catalog](https://autoparts.fit/products): Full catalog with specifications
- [Customer Inquiry](https://autoparts.fit/contact): Direct WhatsApp and inquiry form

- [Homepage](https://autoparts.fit/): Company overview and featured products.
- [Products](https://autoparts.fit/products): All parts with YMM fitment filters.
- [Factory](https://autoparts.fit/factory): Manufacturing base, certifications, quality process.
- [Contact](https://autoparts.fit/contact): WhatsApp, email, inquiry form.
- [Sitemap](https://autoparts.fit/sitemap.xml): Complete URL index.
